title: Card Name
Ruling Date
Ruling Text
table-528-528.caption: What are the rulings for the card named and designed by Kev Walker? List them in descending order of dates.
data: If a nontoken creature you control and a token creature you control die simultaneously, Sek'Kuar's ability triggers for the nontoken creature.
The tokens are black and red.
The tokens are black Rat creature tokens with "This creature has fear."
Activating the last ability more than once has no additional effect.
The bonus is cumulative with other effects that change the creature's power and/or toughness.
